scoring_methodology: Weighted composite of 6 factors. Content and quality weighted highest (45%), followed by internal linking and structured data (35%), with external signals (backlinks) and technical SEO (20%) rounding out the score.
visibility_trajectory: Upward. With 460 posts, full FAQ schema, fixed orphans, and 100% featured images, the site is well-positioned for organic visibility growth. Backlink acquisition is the single biggest lever remaining.
status: Visibility Score: 78.5/100 - Primary gap: external backlinks
